name: Plank horizontal (14-2)
description: Wooden plank floor, horizontal layout. 16x16 tile = 1 plank 14px + 2px gap below.
rule_summary: 1px gap top, 14px plank body, 1px gap bottom. Add wood grain via 2-3 vertical-going horizontal lines (rule of thirds vertically). Knots: 1 per plank as small clusters of darker color.
source: Saint11 - Pixel Art Class - Wood Tutorial

layers.name: GUIDE
layers.purpose: Plank seams at y=0 and y=15.

layers.name: GAP
layers.purpose: Pre-fill the seams (top and bottom rows).

layers.name: grain
layers.purpose: Horizontal grain lines: 2-3 lines, slightly broken, at rule-of-thirds.

layers.name: knot
layers.purpose: 1-2 knots per plank: 2x2 dark cluster with concentric ring.
